message:
feat(microsoft365): add delta sync state persistence, subscription tracking, and singleton-writer lease

Implement stateful delta sync infrastructure for Microsoft Graph:
- M365SyncState with delta tokens and subscription state tracking
- Singleton-writer M365SyncLease with acquire/renew/release
- Atomic JSON file helpers for safe concurrent state persistence
- zone_dir requirement in handshake
- Delta sync invoke implementation (m365.delta.sync)
- Subscription create/renew/delete with state tracking
- Structured error types with retryable classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
